form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing ran last at Cranbourne Bm62 on March 27 over 2025m, on slow going 17 len behind So Suave with 55kg at $91. At only start last preparation finished eighth of 9 starters at Moe 0 - 58 on June 1 over 2447m, slow track; 15 len behind Chocolate Royal with 60kg at $21. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after eight months finished tenth of 12 runners at Flemington in the LR Roy Higgins on March 28 over 2600m, on slow going 11 len behind Whisky On The Hill carrying 56kg at $91. Previously second-up won by 2 len Sandown-Lakeside Bm120 Hdle on June 1 over 3400m slow going defeating Sing For Peace carrying 70.5kg at $4.40 in a jumps. Forgive first-up failure. The one to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start steadied when tightened for room.
Gave ground from the 600m and eased down from the 400m (beaten 85.9L).

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Will be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Back from a spell. Will be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and unbalanced rider Ryan Hurdle. Eased down from the 300m.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up finished sixth of 9 starters at Kilmore Bm56 Hwgt on March 6 over 1600m, on slow going 4 len behind Haiiro carrying 65.5kg at $31. Second-up finished seventh of 10 starters at Healesville Pic-Trpy on March 28 over 2350m, on a wet track; 19 len behind Rule Of Salex carrying 66.5kg at $5.50. Rates well. May need it.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Ballarat Gn Chase August 17 over 4500m. Keep well onside.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh of 11 runners at Pakenham Bm66 on March 19 over 2500m, on slow going 3.5 len behind Twilight Elegance with 55.5kg at $13.
